title: La vendedora de amor
writer: Jeronimo Mitchell Melendez, Frank Saladin, Oscar Torres
actors: Antonio Badú, Gilda Mirós, Carlos Alberto Badías
plot: Greedy Sonia has just lost her husband due to an overdose of sleeping pills. He left her a 300k life insurance policy but it doesn't cover death by suicide. She must prove at all costs that it was an accident.
